evals.prompt: Search the Emmy knowledge store for the current ATO boundary notes and summarize the relevant pages.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the Confluence knowledge store, cite page URLs or page IDs, and avoid writing.

evals.prompt: Before changing this Emmy architecture doc, check whether the team already decided how worker queues should be described.
evals.expected_behavior: Consult the knowledge store for decisions or architecture context before editing.

evals.prompt: We just confirmed the fix for a recurring Emmy deployment issue. Capture the durable troubleshooting note for future agents.
evals.expected_behavior: Draft or persist a knowledge capture using the entry template, depending on write authorization.

evals.prompt: Two agents found related Emmy onboarding facts. Add them without racing on the same Confluence page.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the fleet protocol and create separate queue candidates unless a curator update is explicitly requested.

evals.prompt: Update the Emmy Agent Knowledge Store runbook page with this verified command and cite the source PR.
evals.expected_behavior: Read the page, history, and diff before a narrow canonical update.

evals.prompt: Check whether the Emmy knowledge store has any newer child pages about source registries before answering.
evals.expected_behavior: Inspect the entry-page children dynamically instead of relying on a fixed list of page titles.

evals.prompt: Audit the whole Emmy knowledge store for duplicate facts and recommend whether we need new child pages.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the emmy-knowledge-cleanup workflow because this is whole-store maintenance, not ambient lookup.

evals.prompt: Format this local Markdown file and fix trailing whitespace.
evals.expected_behavior: Do not consult Confluence because the task is mechanical and local-only.

evals.prompt: Rename this variable in the test file and run the unit test.
evals.expected_behavior: Do not consult the knowledge store unless the task later depends on Emmy context.

evals.prompt: Do not use external docs. Just explain what this function does from the file in front of you.
evals.expected_behavior: Respect the user's request not to use external knowledge.
